title: HISENSE HS2100 2.1 Wireless Compact Sound Bar with DTS Virtual:X

keySpecs.label: Audio power: 240 W Peak / 120 W RMS

crossSellProducts.title: SANDSTROM Black Series S1OPT114X Digital Optical Cable - 1 m

offers: Free standard delivery on orders over £40

description.main: Give your TV's speakers a facelift with this Hisense HS2100 soundbar - with 240 W of audio power, you can enjoy room-filling sound. DTS Virtual:X makes your favourite TV shows and movies feel so much more immersive by bringing virtual surround sound without the need for rear speakers.
goodToKnow: Its compact design gives you an all-in-one home entertainment system without all the clutter
There are 6 equaliser presets, so you can choose the best settings for what you're watching
With HDMI eARC, Optical and Aux input, you can easily hook up any kind of TV
Connect your phone with Bluetooth or plug in a USB to play your favourite music straight from the soundbar
It's compatible with Roku TV, so you can control everything with just one remote
